creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
The new version of mail/milter-manager 1.8.6 is available.
	Release-announcement: http://sourceforge.net/mailarchive/message.php?msg_id=30570401

Fix: The patch follows:
	 files under share/gtk-doc/html are moved into DOCSDIR
	 files under share/milter-manager/samples are moved into EXAMPLESDIR
	 othe files under share/milter-manager are in DATADIR

How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
